title: cajum
intro: Cajum, also known as Cajanus cajan, is a leguminous plant native to India and Southeast Asia, commonly referred to as pigeon pea or red gram. The cajum plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of cajum include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, among others. Cajum can be prepared as herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is also used as a nutritional supplement due to its high protein and fiber content.
